prestazioni: Engine swap to a **GM LG3 3.6L V6 (LFX variant)** with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Manley H-beam rods, and a billet crankshaft) to handle 800+ HP, paired with a **Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger** (76mm compressor, 84mm turbine) on a custom Precision Turbo manifold with T4 divorced wastegate flanges. Fuel system upgraded with **Bosch 2200cc injectors**, **Walbro 450LPH dual-pump setup**, and a **Holley Dominator ECU** for standalone management with flex-fuel capability.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: **G-Force GSR-45 4-speed dog-ring transmission** with a **PST carbon fiber driveshaft**, **Strange Engineering S60 rear differential** (3.90:1 gearing, LSD), and **South Bend Clutch dual-disc setup** with a billet flywheel. Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV)** featuring 24-way adjustable damping, **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)**, and **Polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension full kit)** for chassis rigidity.

Forced induction and cooling: **Precision Turbo 46mm wastegate** with **Tial MV-R blow-off valve**, **Mishimoto aluminum intercooler (24" x 12" x 3.5")** with custom piping, and a **Moroso dual-core aluminum radiator** paired with a **SPAL 16" puller fan**. Exhaust system features a **custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe** with **Borla Pro XS mufflers** and **Vibrant 1799 resonated catalytic converters** for emissions compliance without power loss.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (modified for Century Coupe) with **custom carbon fiber fender flares**, **duckbill rear spoiler**, and **front lip splitter** (all in raw carbon fiber). Paint scheme: **PPG Deltron Urethane in "Buick Regal Blue" with matte black accents** and **3M Gloss Black vinyl roof wrap**. Wheel setup: **BBS LM-R (18x9.5 +25 front, 18x11 +35 rear)** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/40/18 front, 295/35/18 rear)** and **HRE 358 forged centers**.

**Custom interior overhaul**: **Recaro SPG XL seats** (retrimmed in **Bridge of Weir leather with Alcantara inserts**), **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel** (350mm, suede), and **Rolls-Royce-style wood dash trim** (walnut burl with satin silver inlays). Gauge cluster replaced with **Defi Advance BF series** (boost, oil pressure, wideband AFR) in a **custom aluminum pod**. Sound deadening via **Dynamat Extreme** and **custom aluminum firewall insulation**.

**Lighting and details**: **Lux HID Projector headlights (55W, 6000K)** with **Morimoto LED halo rings**, **VLEDS sequential taillights**, and **custom LED underglow (Philips Ultinon Pro90, 6000K)**. Exterior badging replaced with **3D-printed carbon fiber "Century Turbo" script** (font: **Eurostile Extended Bold**) and **Buick tri-shield emblem in anodized titanium**. Engine bay detailed with **custom aluminum strut brace (Cusco-style)**, **carbon fiber intake manifold cover**, and **anodized gold hardware (ARP, Earl's, AN fittings)**.
